title: Agent Voice Routing Workflow
brief: A fun technical workflow diagram showing an Agent system processing a singing voice across different vocal registers. Top-to-bottom flow with connected nodes: Node 1 shows a person icon with label 'Input: 歌词请求 (Lyrics Request)'. Node 2 is a green box 'Chest Voice Agent (E3-G4)' with 200 OK badge. Node 3 is a yellow box 'Mixed Voice Gateway (G4-D5)' with a routing switch icon. Node 4 is an orange box 'Head Voice Agent (E5-B5)' with a rocket icon. Node 5 is a red box 'Whistle Mode (B5+)' with a flame icon. Node 6 is a trophy icon 'Output: 完美演唱'. Arrows connect all nodes with status labels like '200 OK', 'Zero Downtime'. On the side, a small panel shows 'SLA: P99 < 10ms' and 'Availability: 99.99%'. Dark background with neon accents. Flat tech infographic style. Chinese and English bilingual labels. Clean, modern, slightly humorous.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Agent Voice Routing Workflow'. Diagram type: process diagram. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
